_comment: Maps CoTS album codes to canonical Album name + Year. Edit this file to refine names. Year comes from CoTS upstream (cots-album-details.tsv) but is included here for the OTH bucket (non-album songs) where CoTS leaves it blank.
_note_on_naming: Album names are our canonical labels. CoTS uses codes (TSW, FER, etc.) and short names; we use the standard release names. The first album is 'Taylor Swift' (self-titled, 2006) — Wikipedia and Discogs both use this name.
